description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined, tactical design with a dark, matte exterior and a compact, robust fuselage. The main rotor is mounted centrally, with long, slender blades extending outward, while the tail boom is elongated and ends in a small tail rotor. The landing gear consists of two thin, tubular skids that run parallel beneath the fuselage, providing stable ground support. The cockpit area is integrated into the main body, with a low profile and minimal visible window framing, suggesting a military or utility purpose. Various external details, such as antennae, weapon mounts, and cable-like elements, add to its rugged, utilitarian appearance. The overall color scheme is predominantly black with subtle metallic and yellow highlights on certain components.
description: A dark, tactical helicopter with a streamlined body, long rotor blades, and tubular landing skids. It features a compact cockpit and rugged exterior details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, central rotor mast, and symmetrical rotor blades extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, landing skids, and the tail boom with visible external attachments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetrical spread of the main rotor blades.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the fuselage and landing skids.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, slender main rotor blades, slightly curved, appearing to be made of composite material with a dark finish and subtle yellow tips.
attribute_tail_rotor: Tail rotor is present at the end of the tail boom, appears to have two blades oriented vertically, with a dark color and no visible protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, tubular metal landing skids with a matte black finish, connected by crossbars for structural support.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Cockpit windows are not clearly visible; the cockpit area appears integrated with minimal or no transparent sections discernible from the images.
